entries.name: Cold Grey Morning
entries.description: Damp cold clings to clothes; morale feels heavier.

entries.name: Thick Mists
entries.description: Visibility drops; travel feels uncertain and sounds carry strangely.

entries.name: Needle Rain
entries.description: Cold rain makes roads slick and campfires miserable.

entries.name: Dead Calm
entries.description: No birdsong, no wind; an unnatural quiet settles.

entries.name: Wolf-Wind
entries.description: A biting wind rises, carrying distant howls.

entries.name: Candlelit Dusk
entries.description: Light fades early; shadows feel longer than they should.

entries.name: Black Clouds
entries.description: Storm clouds gather but never quite break.

entries.name: Unnatural Chill
entries.description: Breath fogs instantly; something nearby feels wrong.
